examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないではおかない
examples.sentence: 彼女は毎回遅刻をしては、先生に怒られないではおかない。
examples.translation: Every time she's late, she inevitably gets scolded by the teacher.
examples.translationEn: Every time shes late, she inevitably gets scolded by the teacher
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa maikai chikoku o shite wa, sensei ni okorarenaide wa okanai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Every time shes late, she inevitably gets scolded by the teacher

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないではおかない
examples.sentence: 美味しいものがあれば、彼は食べないではおかない。
examples.translation: If there's delicious food, he can't help but eat it.
examples.translationEn: If theres delicious food, he cant help but eat it
examples.romaji: Oishii mono ga areba, kare wa tabenai de wa okanai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If theres delicious food, he cant help but eat it

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないではおかない
examples.sentence: この小説は感動的で、読めば涙を流さないではおかない。
examples.translation: This novel is so moving that you can't help but shed tears when you read it.
examples.translationEn: This novel is so moving that you cant help but shed tears when you read it
examples.romaji: Kono shōsetsu wa kandōteki de, yomeba namida o nagasanai de wa okanai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: This novel is so moving that you cant help but shed tears when you read it

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないではおかない
examples.sentence: 毎日練習しているから、試合では勝たないではおかないだろう。
examples.translation: He practices every day, so he's bound to win the match.
examples.translationEn: He practices every day, so hes bound to win the match
examples.romaji: Mainichi renshū shite iru kara, shiai de wa katanai de wa okanai darō.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He practices every day, so hes bound to win the match

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないではすまない
examples.sentence: 失敗をしたら、謝らないではすまない。
examples.translation: If you make a mistake, you have to apologize—there’s no way around it.
examples.translationEn: If you make a mistake, you have to apologize—there’s no way around it
examples.romaji: Shippai o shitara, ayamaranai de wa sumanai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If you make a mistake, you have to apologize—there’s no way around it

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないではすまない
examples.sentence: この問題は重大なので、報告しないではすまない。
examples.translation: This issue is so serious that I must report it.
examples.translationEn: This issue is so serious that I must report it
examples.romaji: Kono mondai wa jūdai na node, hōkoku shinai de wa sumanai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: This issue is so serious that I must report it

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないではすまない
examples.sentence: この映画はとても感動的で、泣かないではすまない。
examples.translation: This movie is so moving that you can’t help but cry.
examples.translationEn: This movie is so moving that you can’t help but cry
examples.romaji: Kono eiga wa totemo kandōteki de, nakanai de wa sumanai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: This movie is so moving that you can’t help but cry

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないではすまない
examples.sentence: 子供が間違えたら、教えないではすまない。
examples.translation: If a child makes a mistake, you must correct them—there’s no avoiding it.
examples.translationEn: If a child makes a mistake, you must correct them—there’s no avoiding it
examples.romaji: Kodomo ga machigaetara, oshienai de wa sumanai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If a child makes a mistake, you must correct them—there’s no avoiding it

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないまでも
examples.sentence: 全てを理解しないまでも、基本的なことは分かってほしい。
examples.translation: Even if you don't understand everything, I'd like you at least to grasp the basics.
examples.translationEn: Even if you dont understand everything, Id like you at least to grasp the basics
examples.romaji: Subete o rikai shinai made mo, kihonteki na koto wa wakatte hoshii.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Even if you dont understand everything, Id like you at least to grasp the basics

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないまでも
examples.sentence: 会えないまでも、電話で声を聞きたい。
examples.translation: Even if we can’t meet, I still want to hear your voice over the phone.
examples.translationEn: Even if we can’t meet, I still want to hear your voice over the phone
examples.romaji: Aenai made mo, denwa de koe o kikitai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Even if we can’t meet, I still want to hear your voice over the phone

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないまでも
examples.sentence: 毎日は無理にしても、週に一度くらいはジョギングを続けたい。
examples.translation: Even if I can't do it every day, I want to at least keep jogging once a week.
examples.translationEn: Even if I cant do it every day, I want to at least keep jogging once a week
examples.romaji: Mainichi wa muri ni shite mo, shū ni ichido kurai wa jogingu o tsuzuketai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Even if I cant do it every day, I want to at least keep jogging once a week

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないまでも
examples.sentence: 全員に気に入られないまでも、誠実に向き合いたい。
examples.translation: Even if not everyone will like me, I still want to face them sincerely.
examples.translationEn: Even if not everyone will like me, I still want to face them sincerely
examples.romaji: Zen'in ni ki ni irarenai made mo, seijitsu ni mukiai tai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Even if not everyone will like me, I still want to face them sincerely

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないものだろうか
examples.sentence: もっと時間があれば、ここに来られないものだろうか。
examples.translation: If I had more time, wouldn't it be possible to come here?
examples.translationEn: If I had more time, wouldnt it be possible to come here?
examples.romaji: Motto jikan ga areba, koko ni korarenai mono darou ka.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If I had more time, wouldnt it be possible to come here?

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないものだろうか
examples.sentence: 彼女にもっとよく説明すれば、理解できないものだろうか。
examples.translation: If I explain it better to her, wouldn't she understand?
examples.translationEn: If I explain it better to her, wouldnt she understand?
examples.romaji: Kanojo ni motto yoku setsumei sureba, rikai dekinai mono darou ka.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If I explain it better to her, wouldnt she understand?

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないものだろうか
examples.sentence: この問題を解決する方法はないものだろうか。
examples.translation: Isn't there a way to solve this problem?
examples.translationEn: Isnt there a way to solve this problem?
examples.romaji: Kono mondai o kaiketsu suru houhou wa nai mono darou ka.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Isnt there a way to solve this problem?

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないものだろうか
examples.sentence: 自分の間違いを認められないものだろうか。
examples.translation: Can't I admit my own mistakes?
examples.translationEn: Cant I admit my own mistakes?
examples.romaji: Jibun no machigai o mitomerarenai mono darou ka.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Cant I admit my own mistakes?

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないものでもない
examples.sentence: 旅行に行きたいと思わないものでもない。
examples.translation: It's not that I never want to travel.
examples.translationEn: Its not that I never want to travel
examples.romaji: Ryokou ni ikitai to omowanai mono demo nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Its not that I never want to travel

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないものでもない
examples.sentence: 彼の言ったこと全部が間違いないものでもない。
examples.translation: It's not that everything he said is completely free from mistakes.
examples.translationEn: Its not that everything he said is completely free from mistakes
examples.romaji: Kare no itta koto zenbu ga machigai nai mono demo nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Its not that everything he said is completely free from mistakes

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないものでもない
examples.sentence: その問題が解けないものでもない。
examples.translation: It's not that the problem can't be solved.
examples.translationEn: Its not that the problem cant be solved
examples.romaji: Sono mondai ga tokenai mono demo nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Its not that the problem cant be solved

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないものでもない
examples.sentence: 彼に会いたくないものでもない。
examples.translation: It's not that I don't want to see him.
examples.translationEn: Its not that I dont want to see him
examples.romaji: Kare ni aitakunai mono demo nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Its not that I dont want to see him

examples.grammarPoint: Verb の ない Noun
examples.sentence: 笑いのない人生は、つまらない。
examples.translation: A life without laughter is boring.
examples.translationEn: A life without laughter is boring
examples.romaji: Warai no nai jinsei wa, tsumaranai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: A life without laughter is boring

examples.grammarPoint: Verb の ない Noun
examples.sentence: 水のない場所には、人は住めない。
examples.translation: People cannot live in a place without water.
examples.translationEn: People cannot live in a place without water
examples.romaji: Mizu no nai basho ni wa, hito wa sumenai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: People cannot live in a place without water

examples.grammarPoint: Verb の ない Noun
examples.sentence: 言葉のない世界は、想像するのが難しい。
examples.translation: It's hard to imagine a world without words.
examples.translationEn: Its hard to imagine a world without words
examples.romaji: Kotoba no nai sekai wa, souzou suru no ga muzukashii.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Its hard to imagine a world without words

examples.grammarPoint: Verb の ない Noun
examples.sentence: 愛のない結婚は、長続きしない。
examples.translation: A marriage without love will not last.
examples.translationEn: A marriage without love will not last
examples.romaji: Ai no nai kekkon wa, nagatsudzuki shinai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: A marriage without love will not last

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ば きりがない
examples.sentence: 悪口を言い始めればきりがない。
examples.translation: Once I start speaking ill of someone, there's no end.
examples.translationEn: Once I start speaking ill of someone, theres no end
examples.romaji: Waruguchi o iihajimereba kiri ga nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Once I start speaking ill of someone, theres no end

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ば きりがない
examples.sentence: 彼の欠点を数えればきりがない。
examples.translation: If I start counting his flaws, there will be no end.
examples.translationEn: If I start counting his flaws, there will be no end
examples.romaji: Kare no ketten o kazoereba kiri ga nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If I start counting his flaws, there will be no end

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ば きりがない
examples.sentence: この国の美しい場所は、挙げればきりがない。
examples.translation: If I start listing this country's beautiful places, there's no end.
examples.translationEn: If I start listing this countrys beautiful places, theres no end
examples.romaji: Kono kuni no utsukushii basho wa, agereba kiri ga nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If I start listing this countrys beautiful places, theres no end

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ば きりがない
examples.sentence: ほかにも例を挙げればきりがない。
examples.translation: If I start giving more examples, there will be no end.
examples.translationEn: If I start giving more examples, there will be no end
examples.romaji: Hoka ni mo rei o agereba kiri ga nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If I start giving more examples, there will be no end

examples.grammarPoint: Verb もしないで
examples.sentence: 調べもしないで、答えを書きました。
examples.translation: I wrote the answer without even investigating.
examples.translationEn: I wrote the answer without even investigating
examples.romaji: Shirabe mo shinai de, kotae o kakimashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I wrote the answer without even investigating

examples.grammarPoint: Verb もしないで
examples.sentence: 彼は試験を勉強もしないで、テストに合格した。
examples.translation: He passed the test without even studying.
examples.translationEn: He passed the test without even studying
examples.romaji: Kare wa shiken o benkyou mo shinai de, tesuto ni goukaku shita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He passed the test without even studying

examples.grammarPoint: Verb もしないで
examples.sentence: 彼女はその本を読みもしないで、レポートを書いた。
examples.translation: She wrote her report without even reading the book.
examples.translationEn: She wrote her report without even reading the book
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa sono hon o yomi mo shinai de, repooto o kaita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: She wrote her report without even reading the book

examples.grammarPoint: Verb もしないで
examples.sentence: 準備もしないで、プレゼンテーションを始めました。
examples.translation: He started the presentation without even preparing.
examples.translationEn: He started the presentation without even preparing
examples.romaji: Junbi mo shinai de, purezenteeshon o hajimemashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He started the presentation without even preparing

examples.grammarPoint: Verb やしない
examples.sentence: こんな時に泣きやしない。
examples.translation: I would never cry at a time like this.
examples.translationEn: I would never cry at a time like this
examples.romaji: Konna toki ni naki-yashinai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I would never cry at a time like this

examples.grammarPoint: Verb やしない
examples.sentence: 私が彼を助けやしない。
examples.translation: There's no way I'd help him.
examples.translationEn: Theres no way Id help him
examples.romaji: Watashi ga kare o tasuke-yashinai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Theres no way Id help him

examples.grammarPoint: Verb やしない
examples.sentence: 彼がそんなことを言いやしない。
examples.translation: He would never say such a thing.
examples.translationEn: He would never say such a thing
examples.romaji: Kare ga sonna koto o ii-yashinai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He would never say such a thing

examples.grammarPoint: Verb やしない
examples.sentence: 私がそんな高価なものを買いやしない。
examples.translation: There's no way I'd buy something so expensive.
examples.translationEn: Theres no way Id buy something so expensive
examples.romaji: Watashi ga sonna kouka na mono o kai-yashinai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Theres no way Id buy something so expensive

examples.grammarPoint: Verb よう
examples.sentence: この問題を解くように努力します。
examples.translation: I will try to solve this problem.
examples.translationEn: I will try to solve this problem
examples.romaji: Kono mondai o toku you ni doryoku shimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I will try to solve this problem

examples.grammarPoint: Verb よう
examples.sentence: 彼が言ったようにやりましょう。
examples.translation: Let's do it the way he said.
examples.translationEn: Lets do it the way he said
examples.romaji: Kare ga itta you ni yarimashou.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Lets do it the way he said

examples.grammarPoint: Verb よう
examples.sentence: 毎日走るようにしています。
examples.translation: I make it a point to run every day.
examples.translationEn: I make it a point to run every day
examples.romaji: Mainichi hashiru you ni shiteimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I make it a point to run every day

examples.grammarPoint: Verb よう
examples.sentence: 自分の心を大切にするように。
examples.translation: Try to take care of your own heart.
examples.translationEn: Try to take care of your own heart
examples.romaji: Jibun no kokoro o taisetsu ni suru you ni.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Try to take care of your own heart
